message:
fix(vfs): honor delete flag in shm_unmap to clear registered SHM state

The delete parameter in release_shm_owner_state was previously ignored
(prefixed with underscore), so shm_unmap(delete=true) only removed
SHM state when no other owners remained. Now the delete flag triggers
immediate cleanup regardless of orphan status, matching SQLite
semantics. Includes a regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
